tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All fail-to-pass tests (test_jwt_encoding_in_callback, test_jwt_decoding_in_create_session, test_oauth_provider_variable_mapping, test_oauth_token_requires_provider, test_provider_payload_validation, test_jwt_import_exists) use PHP's preg_match/strpos to search for text patterns in the source file.
